name: sls.tf-typescript-parser
description: TypeScript configuration parser for sls.tf Terraform module
comment: No install is needed at plan time. SAM uses a vendored, tree-shaken js-yaml (vendor/js-yaml/). TypeScript configs run on Node's native TS support (Node >= 22.7) with zero dependencies. ts-node + typescript are an OPTIONAL compatibility engine, auto-used if present, for legacy configs that rely on CommonJS require(), extensionless imports, or tsconfig path aliases: `npm install ts-node@^10 typescript@^5` in this directory. js-yaml is a devDependency only (offline elemental converter + re-vendoring), never used at plan time.
author: sls.tf
